case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. vs. BREDIN, JUDE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT : RENTAL AGREEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF 22-SEP-01 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. SERVED SEP-22-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BREDIN, JUDE STAFFORD, PAUL MULCAHY, NORA DALTON, EMMA MCGILL, CLAIRE
